series_metadata.series_title: Education Course Applications - Approvals and Denials
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, course applications, course materials or books in paper or electronic form, and correspondence filed with the Division where course providers are requesting approval from the Division to offer certain courses for education purposes in satisfaction of license law requirements. This retention schedule also includes, but is not limited to, any commission or board approvals or denials, documents submitted to the commission or board for their review or any related correspondence. Course materials may contain proprietary information that is confidential for the education provider.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For images in machine readable format or on the computer, records shall be destroyed three years from the date of approval, date of denial by the Division or the expiration of appeals, whichever is later. ; Microform: For images in microform, records shall be destroyed three years from the date of approval, date of denial by the Division or the expiration of appeals, whichever is later. ; Paper: Paper copy may be imaged and indexed to a machine readable format on the computer. Upon confirmation that the paper copy was properly imaged and indexed, then the paper record may be shredded. Any paper records that can not be imaged and indexed shall be maintained in paper form on site and destroyed three years from the date of approval, date of denial by the Division or expiration of appeals, whichever is later., Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
